title: CWFIS Web Map Service (WMS)
description: Canadian wildfire and fire management layers including fire danger ratings and smoke tracking.
abstract: A compliant implementation of WMS plus most of the SLD extension (dynamic styling). Can also generate PDF, SVG, KML, GeoRSS
